messages.text: mornin girl... surviving. barely lol. up since 5 with bray, biscuit threw up on the rug, and i still gotta chart from last night. tell me somethin good before i clock in 💀
u get bray? cheer runs late
hey hon! so for Thursday — i can swing both girls if you grab em Tuesday? Patricia's got my two til 5:30 so i'm good after. lmk! 💕
who's got the 8am perio tmrw, me or hygiene 2? schedule's showing double booked again

so the hand thing is back. the knuckle. swole up again last night and i didn't go in, i know i know don't start. just... if it was you what bloodwork would you ask for first. asking for me obviously. don't say anything to anybody k
Hi Patricia — still good for the kids Thursday after school? Dustin's got a delivery run til 6. Thank you so much, really appreciate you.
ok real talk — are the lululemon aligns actually worth it or am i being dumb. saw a dupe at target. i KNOW you'll be honest with me lol
long week. you ok? you seemed off after the Hendricks thing today. you don't have to carry all of it you know

idk britt. he's just... not here even when he's here. sat at the table last night and neither of us said a word the whole dinner. i don't even know how to bring it up anymore. anyway. how's your mama doin
Hey mama just tried you — call me back when you can, wanna hear your numbers this week. did you pick up the strips? love you ❤️
cheer this kiddo on y'all ⚽️ first game of the season and she picked her own socks lol… go #7 💙 #cheermom #blessed
WellnessQuiz: Your results are READY 🩺 Based on your answers, women over 30 like you may be missing 1 key marker. Tap to unlock → wlnsq.co/r2x8

hey… so the hands are worse this morning. couldn't get the toothpaste cap off, had to run em under hot water again. i'm prob being dramatic but it scared me a little. don't say anything obviously. just needed to say it out loud to somebody who's not gonna freak

you are NOT being dramatic stop it. ok listen — when you go, you ask for a CBC, an ANA, and a TSH. write it down. don't wait around for Dustin to have a feeling about it, just book it hon. i love you. text me the second you make the appt

3 new: 'You left your results unviewed 😟 don't ignore what your body is telling you' · 'Talk to a board-certified provider tonight, $0 first visit' · 'Tired & achy? Brittany M. said this supplement 'gave me my mornings back.' Reorder reminder set.'
pick up bray 3:15

omg yes — we use Dr. Patel over by the Bridge Park area, she's amazing with the littles, super gentle. tell em Sarah sent you 😊 we're due for ours too, just been so slammed i keep pushing it lol. coffee soon??
hey can you take the 8am hygiene block tmrw? i can cover your 2 perio if you want to swap 🙂 …also it was kind of a long day. anyway. lmk on the swap
[hand froze on the envelope — the window kind, the 614 return address. didn't open it. slid it under the catalogs and the school flyers. not today. not in front of the kids. just not today.]

i'm ok i'm ok. just had a rough one. the money stuff is… it's a lot right now and i can't — [voice catches] sorry. i keep doing this where i hold it til i'm in the car. anyway. how's your shift. tell me literally anything else
Your test results are now available. Log in to view: portal.mercylab.org · Do not reply to this automated message.

[screenshot] ok i opened it sitting in the parking lot, hands shaking, very normal of me. there's like three things flagged with little arrows and i don't know what any of it means. what do i even ask for now?? do i call the regular doctor or… i don't even know who i call
rough week. that's all. (his reply: 'you carry too much, you know that? you always have.') …yeah. anyway

[Sunday-ish purge — held the Signal thread open a second too long, then cleared it. screen empty now. that little hollow feeling after, like i did something wrong by erasing it instead of by keeping it.]
crimson cup thursday morning?? after drop-off! lol we are SO overdue. things are good here just busy busy, you know how it is 🙃 can't wait to catch up girl

hey it's late i know... can't sleep again. that bloodwork you told me to ask for, i got some of it back tonight on the portal and my hands are shaking. one number's flagged and i don't even know what it means. i keep reading it over and over. i'm scared britt. like really scared. don't say anything to anybody ok i just needed to say it out loud to someone

knuckle's worse today. can barely make a fist holding the scaler at work, had to fake it through a cleaning lol 😅 it's the same one. when does it stop being 'nothing' and start being the thing my aunt had
i know it's late. just sitting in the parking lot before i go in and didn't want to go in yet
then sit. i'm up. you don't have to be okay tonight.

ok i did it. i booked it. june 30. the rheumatology consult, took the first cancellation they had. used the laptop so it wouldn't... anyway. don't tell anyone, not even if mom asks why i'm acting weird. especially not dustin. i just need it to be a thing i did before it's a thing i have to explain
patricia has bray after school. don't forget kaylee cheer 6
don't read into it that i'm up again. it's fine. it's just one of those nights where the house is too quiet and my head is too loud

momma did you check your sugar after supper? read it to me. ...okay that's high again, did you take the metformin or did you skip it 'because you felt fine'. i can SEE you grinning. i'm gonna order you that monitor that tells my phone so quit fighting me on it. no i'm fine, just tired, work's been a lot. i love you. i'll call sunday after.

ok week recap because you're the only one getting the real version: hands worse, dustin still hardly talking, sent travis his fifty 🌻, almost cried doing kaylee's hair this morning for no reason. but june 30 is on the calendar. i keep telling myself just get to june 30 and i'll know something. counting down to it like it's gonna save me. night britt. love you for real

ok so rheum appt is officially 8 days out now... still haven't told Dustin. i keep openin my mouth to say it and then he's got that face about the bills and i just... can't add to it. it's fine. i'm fine. tell me somethin good lol
can you grab bray, running late
hey girl!! quick one — you doing the cheer carpool Saturday or should i? happy to take the morning if it helps, kaylee's been countin down all week 😅

Hi — just following up on our note about Brayden. We'd love to get the evaluation scheduled when you're able. He's such a bright boy, we just want to make sure he has the right supports. Let me know if you have any questions!

the eval thing came back from his teacher again today and Britt i swear i wanted to cry in the car. it's not even that i don't believe em, it's the $2,400 deductible starin at me. how do i tell my baby boy 'sorry the appointment that helps you costs more than we have' ... anyway. enough. how's your week
[deleted within the hour] don't read into the radio silence today, just been a morning. hope your side of the office is quieter than mine 🙃

didn't sleep again, knee's bad this morning, can't make a fist all the way. i KNOW that's exactly the kind of thing i'm supposed to write down for the appt and i did, in my notes, like you said. just sayin it out loud to somebody who won't panic. love you
confirmed!! i've got the cupcakes for Saturday y'all 🧁 chocolate + vanilla, 2 dozen. anybody have a kiddo that can't do nuts? lmk so i grab the right kind!
soccer 9am tmrw

had coffee w Megan this mornin and i sat there nodding about which leggings are 'worth it' while my card is maxed lmao. nobody at that table knows. i'm so tired of the performance Britt. but the appt is THIS week now and honestly i'm more scared of what they find than what they don't. is that crazy. it's crazy. but the marriage feels like two people running a daycare and a debt collector at this point and i don't even know which thing keeps me up more. ok i'm done unloadin on you, go to bed

[FaceTime, 51 min] hey mama did you check your sugar after supper? ... mmhm. and you been takin the metformin like the doctor said, not skippin? ... no i'm good, we're all good here, kids are great, Dustin's stayin busy. just tired is all, you know how the office gets. don't you worry about me. tell me about the church ladies

call Brayden's teacher re: eval — Mon??
✓ called pharmacy — mom's metformin refill ordered, ready Fri
rheum appt?? — CALL MON (still need to book Brayden eval too)
